This museum showcases incredible quilts and all things fiber by outstanding craftspeople. I had to look at all the offerings twice. My two favorites were among this that used discarded clothing for component pieces. 
The museum is coordinated with all major quilt and fiber events and expos. They also offer a great gift shop with event info and a newsletter. 
The shop offers quality quilt books today on same with hardbacks for $10 and paperbacks for $5 so I purchased holiday gifts for my fiber friends. 
Great postcards too
The venue is accessible with push door entry. Accessible restroom with stall that has 2 grab bars and 5ftx5ft space. 
Street accessible parking for 2 hours paid by credit card or app. Curb cuts in front of museum
